creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rene
Date: Mon Jan  6 12:21:33 2014
New Revision: 338868
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338868

Log:
  Deprecate and schedule for removal on 2014-01-22, depends on expired
  cad/salome-kernel.
  
  PR:		ports/185111
  Submitted by:	rene
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (devel@stasyan.com , 14 days)

@@ -4,6 +4,9 @@

+DEPRECATED=	depends on expired cad/salome-kernel
